AND 1064 DIVISADERO ST. $308.00 RENT, $2,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $232.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,740.00, LEASE FORFEITED, MONEY JUDGMENT AS TO RALPH JOHNSON ONLY. SEE JUDGMENT FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS.
